HomeAffiliation Process

Affiliation Process

Empowering entrepreneurs to transform education. Join our global network of learning centers and shape the future of learning.

Affiliation Fees

No Renewal Fees

DMIT Center

₹24,999/-One-time
  • DMIT Franchise Rights
  • Basic Support Package
  • Initial Training Session
Most Popular

Abacus Center

₹49,999/-One-time
  • Full Abacus Curriculum
  • Marketing Kit & Branding
  • Premium Teacher Support

DMIT & Abacus

₹74,999/-One-time
  • Combined Center Rights
  • Priority Operational Support
  • Advanced Master Training

Franchisee Terms & Eligibility

Space Requirement

Dedicated area of 200 - 250 sq. ft. for learning.

No Age Bar

Open to all passionate educators and entrepreneurs.

Free Study Material

Complete training materials provided at no cost.

Legal Compliances

Adhere to Orphosys operational guidelines.

Teacher Qualification

Minimum 10+2 with good communication skills.

Local Marketing

Responsible for center promotion within 5km radius.

Steps to Open Your Study Centre

1

Visit Website

Explore our vision and offerings.

2

Fill Form

Provide basic details via enquiry form.

3

Pay Fees

Complete one-time affiliation payment.

4

Expert Call

Final onboarding with our experts.

Ready to Empower Your Future?

Join thousands of educators who have transformed their careers through Orphosys.

Apply for Affiliation
